passwordPolicy: length(8) and upperCase(1) and digits(1) and notUsername

realm.name: guest
realm.description: Self-registered guest user — KPI data captured at registration

clientScopes.name: saeon-profile
clientScopes.description: SAEON extended profile — includes institution and user_type claims

attributes.consent.screen.text: Access your SAEON profile including institution affiliation

kc.user.profile.config: {"attributes":[{"name":"username","displayName":"${username}","validations":{"length":{"min":3,"max":255},"username-prohibited-characters":{}},"permissions":{"view":["admin","user"],"edit":["admin"]}},{"name":"email","displayName":"${email}","required":{"roles":["user"]},"validations":{"email":{},"length":{"max":255}},"permissions":{"view":["admin","user"],"edit":["admin","user"]}},{"name":"firstName","displayName":"First Name","required":{"roles":["user"]},"validations":{"length":{"min":1,"max":255},"person-name-prohibited-characters":{}},"permissions":{"view":["admin","user"],"edit":["admin","user"]}},{"name":"lastName","displayName":"Last Name","required":{"roles":["user"]},"validations":{"length":{"min":1,"max":255},"person-name-prohibited-characters":{}},"permissions":{"view":["admin","user"],"edit":["admin","user"]}},{"name":"institution","displayName":"Education / Research Institution","required":{"roles":["user"]},"annotations":{"inputHelperTextBefore":"Enter the full name of your institution, university, or employer"},"validations":{"length":{"min":2,"max":255}},"permissions":{"view":["admin","user"],"edit":["admin","user"]}},{"name":"user_type","displayName":"User Type","validations":{"options":{"options":["guest","registered","staff"]}},"annotations":{"inputType":"select"},"permissions":{"view":["admin","user"],"edit":["admin"]}}],"groups":[{"name":"basic","displayHeader":"Basic Information","displayDescription":"Your contact details"},{"name":"research","displayHeader":"Research Profile","displayDescription":"Help us understand how you use SAEON data and services"}]}
